texts.full_text: f optical technology, particularly where virtually unlimited bandwidth and low attenuation are beneficial. Cable television systems are one example where optical fiber technology is providing efficient and economical alternatives to prior coaxial cable distribution schemes. Fiber optic communication systems which utilize direct detect, amplitude modulated optical carriers are particularly attractive. The optical carrier is modulated by a signal, e.g., a video signal, and the modulated optical carrier is transmitted to a remote receiver. The receiver demodulates the optical carrier to recover the signal. The signal is then transmitted to a The optical carrier is modulated

texts.full_text: t I don't want him to know at 8 years old," says Michael, crying. Michael passed a lie-detector test. His innocence claim was buoyedby a sheriff's investigator who rallied to his side until ajudge released Josh, finding "there is not reason to believe any inappropriate sexual activity" took place [Guilty unless and until you can prove you are innocent]. CPS Human Services cited confidentiality laws when asked about its fumbling of the case. "We only remove the child from the home when we believe or know to be true that staying in the home is not inthe best interest of the child," said county spokeswoman Nichole Parmelly [It frequently seems that what CPS social workers believe are the voices in their head]. Two months later, Josh hasnightmares and trouble falling asleep[and he and his parents will probably be troubled the rest of their livesby this incident].
